_description: Integration mapping for CMMC Scoreboard app

odp.ts.description: Complete DoD ODP values — drop-in replacement for shared/odp.ts
odp.ts.interface_changes: None — same OdpEntry and ControlOdp interfaces
notes: Original 7 AC controls preserved with full R3 statement text and relatedControls
New 33 controls have ODP values but empty statement[] and relatedControls[]
The UI will render ODP values table correctly for all controls
Statement section will be empty for new controls (can be populated later from R3 source)

objectiveGuidance.ts.description: Enriched objective guidance — drop-in replacement for shared/objectiveGuidance.ts
objectiveGuidance.ts.what_changed: Added simplafi field, upgraded notes, added assessment metadata
interface_changes: Added discussion?: string (Assessment Guide discussion text)
Added verb?: string (primary verb driving POLICY/CONFIG classification)
notes: simplafi field contains 'Let\'s Simplafi It' hover-over tooltip content
Targets non-technical business owners (60-90 word range)
References Microsoft GCC/GCCH ecosystem (Entra, Intune, Purview, Defender)
POLICY/CONFIG enforcement pairs cross-referenced in tooltip text
discussion/furtherDiscussion truncated to 500 chars to manage file size
Full enrichment data available in cmmc-objectives-complete.json if needed

objective_id_mapping.description: 3 single-objective controls use different ID format
objective_id_mapping.note: Already handled in the generated files — app IDs are used throughout

simplafi_tooltip.description: Add hover-over tooltip to each objective in ControlCard.tsx
simplafi_tooltip.suggested_component: Tooltip or Popover wrapping the objective label
simplafi_tooltip.note: This is the 'Let\'s Simplafi It' hover content — click-in opens full enrichment

odp_badge.description: ODP badge/dialog already exists in ControlCard.tsx — no UI changes needed
odp_badge.note: Just replacing odp.ts adds the remaining 33 controls automatically

enriched_notes.description: The notes field now has real implementation guidance for all objectives
enriched_notes.note: AC domain already had real notes in the app; now all 14 domains are populated
